claims.statement: CipherVault is a local file vault for desktop use.
claims.source_quote: A local file vault for your desktop.

claims.statement: CipherVault protects sensitive files behind a master password.
claims.source_quote: CipherVault lets you protect sensitive files behind a master password

claims.statement: CipherVault encrypts everything stored on disk.
claims.source_quote: everything stored on disk is encrypted

claims.statement: CipherVault does not send data anywhere.

entities.description: A desktop local file vault application.
